title: ammannia auriculata var. arenaria
intro: Ammannia auriculata var. arenaria, also known as the Golden Cup Grass, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Lythraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat fever, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Ammannia auriculata var. arenaria include its potential to alleviate symptoms of malaria, as well as its use as a treatment for various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or poultice, and its leaves and roots are commonly used in traditional herbal remedies.
